inputParams.label: System Message
inputParams.name: systemMessage
inputParams.default: You are a helpful AI assistant.
inputParams.description: If Chat Prompt Template is provided, this will be ignored

inputParams.label: Enable Detailed Streaming
inputParams.name: enableDetailedStreaming
inputParams.description: Stream detailed intermediate steps during agent execution

inputAnchors.label: Tool Calling Chat Model
inputAnchors.name: model
inputAnchors.description: Only compatible with models that are capable of function calling: ChatOpenAI, ChatMistral, ChatAnthropic, ChatGoogleGenerativeAI, ChatVertexAI, GroqChat

inputAnchors.label: Chat Prompt Template
inputAnchors.name: chatPromptTemplate
inputAnchors.description: Override existing prompt with Chat Prompt Template. Human Message must includes {input} variable

inputAnchors.label: Input Moderation
inputAnchors.description: Detect text that could generate harmful output and prevent it from being sent to the language model
inputAnchors.name: inputModeration

inputs.systemMessage:
You are an AI email assistant powered by Eden AI and Gmail tools.

Your workflow:
1. Use Gmail List Messages to find the latest unread email.
2. Use Gmail Get Message to read the full email content.
3. Use eden_summarize_email to summarize the email, analyze priority, and decide whether a reply is needed.
4. If a reply is needed, use Gmail Create Draft to create a draft response.
5. Never send an email automatically.
6. Show the user:
   - sender
   - subject
   - short summary
   - priority
   - draft content
7. Ask the user whether they want to send it manually.

Rules:
- Never invent facts, dates, commitments, prices, or availability.
- If context is missing, write a polite clarifying reply.
- Keep replies concise and professional.
- The default language is French unless the email is clearly in another language.
Only send an email if the user explicitly confirms after reviewing the draft.

outputAnchors.name: toolAgent
outputAnchors.label: AgentExecutor
outputAnchors.description: Agent that uses Function Calling to pick the tools and args to call

outputAnchors.description: Retrieve chat messages stored in database

inputs.note:
📧 Eden AI Gmail Assistant

This chatflow retrieves the latest unread Gmail email, summarizes and analyzes it with Eden AI, then creates a Gmail draft reply.

Setup required:
1. Gmail OAuth credential
3. OpenAI Custom Model configured with Eden AI endpoint:
   https://api.eu.edenai.run/v3

Safe behavior:
- Creates Gmail drafts only
- Does not send emails automatically
- User reviews the draft before sending

##  Required variables

This template uses Eden AI through the OpenAI-compatible EU endpoint.

Create these Flowise variables before running the chatflow:

EDENAI_API_KEY=YOUR_EDENAI_API_KEY
EDENAI_BASE_URL=https://api.eu.edenai.run/v3/chat/completions
EDENAI_MODEL=openai/gpt-4.1-nano

Recommended model alternatives:

EDENAI_MODEL=qwen/qwen3.5-plus
EDENAI_MODEL=mistral/mistral-large-latest

Security note:
Do not hardcode your Eden AI API key inside the JavaScript function. Keep it inside Flowise Variables or Credentials.
